Interface RuleAppCost

All Superinterfaces:
Comparable<RuleAppCost>
All Known Implementing Classes:
NumberRuleAppCost, TopRuleAppCost
public interface RuleAppCost extends Comparable<RuleAppCost>

Represents the costs of a rule. In the default case this is just an integral number, but in some cases it could be just positive infinity.

weigl: It would be better just to implement it on floats!
